description: A photograph of several clear plastic cases holding rows of small capped vials with blue, white and dark lids, arranged on a white surface. Printed labels on the cases read B12, CU100, TSM10 and IP10, with smaller text noting 10 milligrams per portion, 10 servings per box, manufacturing and expiration dates, and For research use only.
notable_text: B12; CU100; TSM10; IP10; 10 milligrams/portion, 10 servings/box; For research use only
